ddls:
CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "region_description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the property */,
  "suburb" TEXT /* Suburb or neighborhood of the property */,
  "bedrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bedrooms in the property */,
  "bathrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bathrooms in the property */,
  "garage" INTEGER /* Number of garages in the property */,
  "land_area" INTEGER /* Land area of the property in square meters */,
  "floor_area" INTEGER /* Floor area of the property in square meters */,
  "build_year" INTEGER /* Year the property was built */,
  "cbd_dist" INTEGER /* Distance to the city center (CBD) in meters */,
  "nearest_stn" TEXT /* Name of the nearest train station */,
  "nearest_stn_dist" INTEGER /* Distance to the nearest train station in meters */,
  "date_sold" TEXT /* Date the property was sold */,
  "postcode" INTEGER /* Postal code of the property */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the property */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the property */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region the property belongs to */,
  "property_type" TEXT /* Type of the property (e.g., house, apartment, townhouse) */,
  "sale_type" TEXT /* Type of the sale (e.g., resale, new development) */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent who sold the property */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schools" (
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school */,
  "school_name" TEXT /* Name of the school */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the school */,
  "suburb" TEXT /* Suburb or neighborhood of the school */,
  "postcode" INTEGER /* Postal code of the school */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the school */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the school */,
  "rank" REAL /* Ranking of the school (lower is better) */,
  "school_type" TEXT /* Type of the school (e.g., public, private, catholic) */,
  "student_enrollment" INTEGER /* Number of students enrolled in the school */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agents" (
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agent */,
  "agent_name" TEXT /* Name of the agent */,
  "agency_name" TEXT /* Name of the agency the agent belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the agent */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the agent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_school_distances" (
  "distance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each distance record */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance between the property and the school in kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("distance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_school_distances_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_school_distances_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each train station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the train station */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the train station */,
  "suburb" TEXT /* Suburb or neighborhood of the train station */,
  "postcode" INTEGER /* Postal code of the train station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the train station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the train station */,
  "station_type" TEXT /* Type of the station (e.g., main, feeder) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_station_distances" (
  "distance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each distance record */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the train station */,
  "distance" INTEGER /* Distance between the property and the train station in meters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("distance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_station_distances_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_station_distances_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, user) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
